textByHashes.6de8d6195cb720b4e9d2a8c504c461f5bc4c1b22: I'm afraid I know not where Artur has gone. I do not speak to him much. He keeps himself to himself.
textByHashes.f9bd163e32b13fb1dde1269c866cefba43c72a61: However, I've noticed him speaking to Olivia before. Maybe she can help.
textByHashes.66f709a69dc233627fc87e2ddbf04895edf552f3: Good day sir. I hope your quest is going well.
textByHashes.eda58c2cbef27ad5205cd79fc49eb463567e82c4: Good day madam. I hope your quest is going well.
textByHashes.462bec4e3a6592affd22d784a27081361b59be62: Good day sir. On behalf of the Hosidius family, I thank you for bringing Artur home.
textByHashes.183939519be29dcd25abe527cd952860784c98f1: Good day madam. On behalf of the Hosidius family, I thank you for bringing Artur home.
textByHashes.cf5fc1d469330728c6777516e251e2c0fda59caf: Good day sir. I'm afraid I can't stop to talk. The new Lord Hosidius has plenty of work for me.
textByHashes.01382c317e684f7b0cf4b54aa396d0a7d96b5e2a: Good day madam. I'm afraid I can't stop to talk. The new Lord Hosidius has plenty of work for me.
